    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    P

    PickACard - Class in nongui.listofcards.magiccard
    Represents the "Pick a Card" Magic Card.
    PickACard() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.PickACard
    Constructs a new Pick a Card card with its identity and effect text.
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.ActionCard
    Executes the specific logic or effect of this card when played.
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.HeroCard.HeroCard
    Attempts to play the hero card onto the player's board.
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
    Attempts to play the item card by selecting a target player and their hero, then equipping the item to that hero.
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.MagicCard.MagicCard
    Executes the specific effect of the magic card when played by a player.
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.BattleFury
     
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.Charm
     
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.FinalSpark
     
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.HowlingGale
     
    playCard(Player) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.magiccard.PickACard
     
    playCard(Player, int) - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
    Allows the player to play an ActionCard from their hand onto the board.
    Player - Class in nongui.baseentity
    Represents a Player in the game.
    Player(String) - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.Player
    Constructs a new Player with default setup.
    players - Static variable in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
